human_actions_pending.context: Needed for PostgreSQL MCP. Find in Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → Database → Connection string (URI format)
Needed to authenticate GitHub MCP. Create at github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' scope

decisions.decision: Home map icon nodes positioned as percentages of 390×800 canvas so they scale to any screen
decisions.rationale: Fixed pixel positions broke layout on real phones

decisions.decision: World entry animation uses worldIn keyframe (not destIn) — destIn has translate(-50%,-50%) which shifted the whole map
Ground shadow is a flex flow sibling between icon and label, not position:absolute inside wrapper
decisions.rationale: Absolute shadow bled over label text

decisions.decision: Garage hero image is full-bleed background behind entire screen with gradient overlay
decisions.rationale: User wanted image to fill whole page, not just top section

decisions.decision: Garage grid icons use real PNG files from src/assets/icons/garage/, no concrete tile background
decisions.rationale: User added real icons; removed GRADIENT_PANEL square behind them

decisions.decision: Username claim + onboarding coachmarks deferred until all 5 destinations have screens
decisions.rationale: Tutorial should point at real screens, not stubs

decisions.decision: Dead-end road spur removed from Home map
decisions.rationale: User found it confusing; future Track feature can add it back

next_action: Build the Add a Car flow — /garage/cars/new. Multi-step: Step 1 (Year/Make/Model/Trim/Nickname/Mileage required), Step 2 (Story optional with SKIP), Step 3 photo deferred. Uses ConcretePanelInput, FONT_TITLE italic for step headings, COLOR_ACCENT CTA buttons. On save, writes to Supabase 'cars' table.
